content: wakelock_plus is the current maintained package to keep the screen awake in Flutter (Android/iOS/desktop/web), superseding the older 'wakelock' package. Call WakelockPlus.enable() in initState()/on timer start and WakelockPlus.disable() in dispose()/on timer end or pause. It only prevents screen dimming/lock, not a CPU/partial wakelock, and requires no special permissions -- but keeping the screen on for up to 120 minutes is a direct, significant battery drain that should be clearly it's own tradeoff (should probably be tied to running-timer state only, not app-wide).
